title: A1.1 — Finalize MVP scope statement
body:
## ID
A1.1

## Description
Define the final MVP scope for Revela as a CNN-first dermatology education prototype.

## Estimate
S

## Acceptance Criteria
- MVP is positioned as an educational reasoning scaffold.
- MVP is not described as a diagnostic tool.
- Scope includes CNN classification, top-3 output, confidence, uncertainty, and safety notes.
- LLM is documented as Week 4 extension, not core 3-week MVP.
- Out-of-scope list is included.

## Dependencies
None.

title: A1.2 — Write core hypothesis
body:
## ID
A1.2

## Description
Write the product hypothesis the MVP will test.

## Estimate
S

## Acceptance Criteria
- Hypothesis mentions dermatology trainees.
- Hypothesis focuses on top-3 differential, confidence, uncertainty, and visual reasoning.
- Hypothesis does not depend on LLM.
- Hypothesis is measurable through user testing.
- Suggested wording included in PRD/README.

## Dependencies
A1.1

title: A1.3 — Define success metrics
body:
## ID
A1.3

## Description
Define project success metrics across product value, model performance, safety, and technical delivery.

## Estimate
S

## Acceptance Criteria
- Primary product metric defined.
- Model metrics defined: top-3 accuracy, macro-F1, balanced accuracy, confusion matrix.
- Safety metrics defined.
- Technical delivery metrics defined.
- Metrics added to README or PRD.

## Dependencies
A1.2

title: A1.4 — Define final feature priority list
body:
## ID
A1.4

## Description
Classify features as Must-have, Should-have, Could-have, or Won’t-have.

## Estimate
S

## Acceptance Criteria
- Must-have features fit 3-week MVP.
- LLM listed under Week 4 extension.
- Grad-CAM, educator dashboard, and case history deferred.
- Prioritization is visible in GitHub labels.

## Dependencies
A1.1

title: B1.1 — Confirm dataset access and license
body:
## ID
B1.1

## Description

## Estimate
S

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dataset access confirmed.
- License or usage constraints documented.
- Download instructions documented.
- Backup dataset identified.
- Dataset decision recorded in README.

## Dependencies
None.

N1.1

## Description

S

## Acceptance Criteria
- LLM role documented as explainer only.
- LLM does not classify image.
- LLM cannot diagnose.
- LLM cannot recommend treatment.
- Banned phrases documented.
- Approved wording documented.

- Prompt accepts visual-feature list.

- Prompt includes safety instructions.
